name: Bot Comms | Stage Language for Webhooks
description: Sends a series of project updates via SMS and email throughout the solar installation process for contacts in the Project Pipeline with a known close date and not marked as lost.
uuid: Bot Comms | Stage Language for Webhooks-1661567267

value.staticValue:
Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. You're moving into the Site Survey phase of your project. The visit takes about an hour, and we'll be taking a few photos of your property and home which will allow us to create an engineered design. Yourself or a decision-maker will need to be home, and we respectfully ask that pets are secured.

If you did not schedule a Site Survey time with your Sales Consultant, a member of our team will reach out shortly to do so. Thanks! 

Reply END to stop texts.

Thank you for choosing Photon Brothers for your solar energy project. We’re excited to partner with you for your installation!

Our process includes five key phases, and you’re now moving into the first step: the Site Survey.


What to Expect for Your Site Survey:

Scheduling: A member of our team will reach out shortly to coordinate your appointment.

Duration: About 1 hour.

Do I need to be home? Yes—a decision-maker must be present.

Need to leave during the visit? That’s totally fine—we can begin inside and finish outside, or the other way around.

Can someone else be home instead of me? Absolutely, as long as they’re of legal age and can make decisions regarding your project if needed.


Access Needed:

Outside: Main electrical panels

Inside (if applicable): Garage, basement, attic (for sub-panels)

Water shutoff valve: We’ll take a quick photo to confirm proper grounding

Gate codes: If applicable, please share any necessary access information


Additional Notes:

Pets: Please secure any pets for everyone’s safety.

Storage near panels: Clear any items blocking electrical panels so our technician can access and photograph them.


What the Technician Will Do:

Take photos of your electrical panels (inside and out, if needed)

Capture drone images if required for system design

Document siding for battery mounting options (if your project includes a battery)


We’ll keep you updated at every stage of your project but if you have any questions, please just reply to this email - we’re here to help.

A member of our team will reach out shortly to schedule a time for your survey. Thank you!

Best,
Photon Brothers

Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. Your project is moving into the Design Approval phase, where our expert team will create an engineered design based on your home's specific layout and energy needs.

This phase typically takes about two weeks and once it’s complete we will send it to you for review and approval before moving on to permitting.

Thanks again for choosing Photon Brothers - we’re excited for your project and will be in contact soon regarding your finalized design.

Reply END to stop texts.

Your Site Survey is complete and we’re moving on to the Design Approval phase! Our team is now creating an engineered design based on your home’s specific layout and energy needs.

This phase typically takes about two weeks and once it’s complete we will send it to you for review and approval before moving on to permitting.

Thanks again for choosing Photon Brothers - we’re excited for your project and will be in contact soon regarding your finalized design.

Best,
Photon Brothers

Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. Your permits and utility approvals are in! That means we’re ready to finalize equipment ordering and schedule your installation. Over the next two weeks, a team member will reach out with preferred dates for our Operations team to install your system. Most installations take 1–2 days, depending on system size.

If your project includes a Tesla Powerwall, please download the Tesla app and have your login email ready—this is important for our team during battery setup.

Let us know if you have any questions. Otherwise, we’ll be in touch soon with scheduling options.

Reply END to stop texts.

Great news: Your permits and utility approvals are in! With all necessary approvals now in place, we are ready to finalize the ordering of your equipment and schedule your installation.

A team member will reach out over the next two weeks with some preferred dates where our Operations team will come and install your project. Most installations are completed in 1-2 days, depending on the system size.


What to Expect Next:

We'll be ordering and receiving your equipment over the next 1–2 weeks, which is required before we can begin installation

We'll contact you to schedule your installation once materials have been secured

Our crew will arrive on the scheduled date to begin the installation

We’ll handle everything from start to finish to ensure a smooth, efficient process


Important Note:
If your system includes a Tesla Powerwall, please download the Tesla app before your installation and have the email address you used to register your account ready when our team arrives. This helps us streamline setup and activation.

We’re excited to bring your system to life! Please let us know if you have any questions, otherwise, we will be in touch soon with some installation dates.

Best,
Photon Brothers

Hi again, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. The installation of your project is complete and your system is one step closer to powering your home! Next up is the Final Inspection, where your local building department ensures everything meets code, safety standards, and Photon Brothers’ quality standards.

What to Expect:

We’ll schedule the inspection with the appropriate local authorities. Once it passes, we’ll request Permission to Operate (PTO) from your utility. You do not need to be home for this inspection as long as we have access to the installed equipment.

We will be in touch once your Inspection has been scheduled.

Reply END to stop texts.

The Installation of your project is complete and we will be moving to the Final Inspection and obtaining Permission to Operate. This is where we work with your local building department to ensure everything has been installed to meet local codes, safety requirements, and Photon Brothers' quality standards.

What to Expect Next: 
We’ll schedule the Final Inspection with the appropriate local authorities. Once the inspection is passed, we’ll move forward with obtaining Permission to Operate (PTO) from your utility company, which typically takes about two weeks. You do not need to be home for this inspection as long as we have access to the installed equipment.

We will be in touch once your Inspection has been scheduled.

Best,
Photon Brothers

Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. Get excited: Your system has passed the Final Inspection! We're now obtaining Permission to Operate (PTO) from your utility. Once approved, your system will be activated and you’ll start enjoying clean, renewable energy at home.

We’re submitting the required documentation and PTO approval typically takes about two weeks. Once we receive approval, we’ll make sure everything is performing as expected. Thanks for your patience - we’re almost there!

Reply END to stop texts.

Great news - your system has passed Final Inspection! We're now obtaining Permission to Operate (PTO) from your utility. Once approved, your system will be activated and you’ll start enjoying clean, renewable energy at home.

What’s next:

We’ll submit the required documentation to your utility

PTO approval typically takes about two weeks

Once approved, we’ll verify your system is performing as expected


Thanks for your patience—we’re almost there!

Best,
Photon Brothers

Hello, this is Olivia with Photon Brothers. Your system is now live and officially up and running! We’ve received Permission to Operate from your utility, and everything is fully operational. We'll be sending you information on how to monitor and maintain your system to keep it performing at its best. If you have any questions, we're always here to help. 

Thank you again for trusting Photon Brothers - we’re proud to have partnered with you on this project.

Reply END to stop texts.

Congratulations - your solar system is now live and officially powering your home! We’ve received Permission to Operate from your utility, and your system is fully operational.

Our team will be following up with helpful information on how to monitor and maintain your system to ensure it runs at peak performance. In the meantime, if you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out - we’re here for you!

Thank you for trusting Photon Brothers with your solar journey. We’re proud to have helped you make the switch to clean, renewable energy!

Best,
Photon Brothers
